autor: by the time we're through we shall have had all we can stand of this North woman. I wouldn't mind betting she thinks we have nothing better to do than run around in circles while she gets on with this three-act problem play of hers.
explicacao: Citação de by the time we're through we shall have had all we can stand of this North woman. I wouldn't mind betting she thinks we have nothing better to do than run around in circles while she gets on with this three-act problem play of hers. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “...I'll tell you something else too” articula reflexao, georgette-heyer, a-blunt-instrument em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como a-blunt-instrument.
